name: Helldivers 2
notes: nProtect GameGuard works well via Proton. Highly CPU-intensive — NTSync greatly improves frame pacing. AMD: force_dx11 resolves common VKD3D performance regressions seen on RDNA hardware; use RADV ICD to ensure Mesa driver is active. NVIDIA: DX12 via VKD3D is generally stable, NVAPI unlocks DLSS.
